quote:
Team — I’m sharing an update.
I’m transitioning from my day-to-day COO/CFO responsibilities to a *board-only role*. I’ll remain fully involved as a *Board Director*, focused on *strategy, governance, and capital stewardship*—helping ensure we remain disciplined, resilient, and positioned for long-te
author: Anton Valkov
